title: BoltChestShop
description: Bolt add-on providing integration support with ChestShop
body:
[Bolt](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bolt) add-on providing integration support with [ChestShop](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/chestshop.51856/).

**Features**
- chestshop permission: Allows access list members to interact with the ChestShop
- automatically create and destroy protections for shop chests

**Configuration**
- To enable the `chestshop` permission, add it to `protections` or `access` in the `allows` permission list.
